mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 240 in the CPIAUCSL index signals central bank inaction, leading to elevated real interest rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in PAYEMS and decline in UNRATE signal a tightening labor market, increasing corporate profit margins and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of PAYEMS and UNRATE fails to predict SPX returns with a Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by FEDFUNDS above 4.5%, lead to higher discount rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) signals strong manufacturing activity, increasing corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict SPX returns with a Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in RSAFS and HOUST signal robust consumer and housing demand, boosting corporate revenues and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint movement of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict SPX returns with a Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate below 4.5% signals a tight labor market, increasing wage pressures and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 4.5% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL > 240) combined with low rates (FEDFUNDS < 0.5%) signals stagflation risks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240 and FEDFUNDS is below 0.5% despite the signal.
